description: Case dimensions: 45 mm x 40 mm Case thickness: 8 mmDial shape: RectangularWarranty: 1yrSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack fibre strap with grooved pattern and a tang clasp for comfort and styleGrey coloured dial with brand logo and branding on the leftQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
